apiBaseUrl.label: ClawMem API Base URL
apiBaseUrl.help: Base URL of an already-running ClawMem REST API. The plugin never starts a binary.

apiToken.label: ClawMem API Token
apiToken.help: Optional bearer token. If omitted, CLAWMEM_API_TOKEN from the environment is used.

tokenBudget.label: Context Token Budget
tokenBudget.help: Metadata budget hint retained for compatibility (default: 800)

enableTools.label: Register Agent Tools
enableTools.help: Register ClawMem retrieval tools for agent-initiated API queries

autoRecall.label: Auto Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically recall relevant memory before each agent turn (default: false)

autoCapture.label: Auto Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically capture important facts after agent responses (default: true)

recallMaxChars.label: Recall Max Characters
recallMaxChars.help: Maximum characters for recall query text (default: 1000)

collections.label: Collections
collections.help: Comma-separated list of collections to index and search (default: all)

apiBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the running ClawMem REST API

apiToken.description: Bearer token for the ClawMem API

recallMaxChars.description: Max chars for recall query text

name: ClawMem
description: OpenClaw memory plugin — external ClawMem REST API adapter (full memory provider)
